headline: Is Honeywell International Inc. (HON) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is HON a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Honeywell International Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by Buffprime. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on HON. Honeywell International Inc.’s share was trading at $231.55 as of May 27th. HON’s trailing and forward P/E were 36.99 and 21.88 respectively according to Yahoo […]
